data.title: ACL Digital buys Symbiance, a US CRO, enhancing Clinical research capabilities with AI, expanding services globally.
data.description: ACL Digital has recently acquired Symbiance to enhance its presence in the Clinical research industry. This acquisition bolsters ACL Digital's offerings in AI-driven clinical research, Contract Research Organization (CRO) services, and pharmacovigilance solutions. The move signifies ACL Digital's dedication to advancing digital transformation for pharmaceutical, biotech, and medical device companies worldwide. This strategic development underscores ACL Digital's focus on expanding its capabilities and market share in the sector.

data.title: Atomix in NYC named No.1 in North America's 50 Best Restaurants 2025 by S.Pellegrino & Acqua Panna. Normand Laprise wins Icon Award, Susan Bae Best Pastry Chef.
data.description: In the year 2025, Atomix, located in New York City, has been recognized as the top restaurant in North America. The prestigious title was awarded by S.Pellegrino & Acqua Panna. Chef Normand Laprise of Toqué! in Montreal received the esteemed Icon Award, supported by Lavazza. Additionally, Susan Bae from Moon Rabbit in Washington DC has been crowned as the best pastry chef in North America.

data.title: China and Japan aim to strengthen supply chain cooperation; CCPIT chairman meets with Japanese business delegation led by Yohei Kono.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Beijing, Ren Hongbin, chairman of the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT), held a meeting with a delegation of Japanese business representatives headed by Yohei Kono, the president of the Japan International Trade organization. The discussion focused on enhancing trade relations between China and Japan.

data.title: Novartis will present data from 34 abstracts at ESMO Congress 2025 in Berlin, showcasing advancements in prostate and breast cancer.
data.description: Novartis is scheduled to unveil findings from 34 abstracts featuring its oncology products at the upcoming European Society for Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress 2025 in Berlin from October 17 to 21.
